title: fix: resolve conflict markers in APPS.md and README.md
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Sweeping up the git dust
gist.blurb: Cleaned up some rogue git conflict markers that snuck into our documentation. The timeline is secure once again.
gist.summary: Resolved git conflict markers in APPS.md and README.md to restore proper table formatting and missing entries.
gist.impact: Documentation renders correctly again without confusing git artifacts.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating messy git conflict markers while Polly the bee sweeps up the documentation.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating jagged git conflict markers off a glowing retro terminal screen. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating jagged git conflict markers off a glowing retro terminal screen. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny broom.
